validation.rationale: Single-file infrastructure fix with concrete reproducer and acceptance criterion. Pre-validated by mayor planning agent (bead dc-dh1).

phases.name: Fix conftest precompile collision
phases.description: Remove the rules_python auto-precompile duplicate-action by making conftest a shared py_library dep instead of per-test src.

steps.name: Fix pytest_tests.bzl conftest collision
criteria: bazel build //backend:test_integration completes without duplicate-action errors
bazel build //backend/... clean across all pytest_tests callers with non-empty conftest
pytest_tests caller signature in backend/BUILD.bazel unchanged
compose_srcs and requires-compose tag behavior preserved
conftest.py still discovered at runtime by pytest
steps.implementation_notes: Wrap the conftest list in a shared native.py_library (testonly=True, imports=['.']) named '${name}_conftest', drop conftest from each py_test srcs, and append the library to deps. No-op when conftest is empty.
steps.scenario: INFRASTRUCTURE: Bazel macro fix. RED state is bazel build failure with duplicate-action on conftest.cpython-311.pyc. GREEN state is build success.
